title: THE OPTIMIZER
description: This modpack will help your performance by reducing RAM usage, improving FPS, and more (note that this modpack includes other mods, not mine). So download it now and optimize your device!
body:
**Optimization Pack is a lightweight yet powerful modpack designed to boost FPS, reduce lag, and improve overall Minecraft performance without significantly altering the vanilla experience.
Perfect for low-end and mid-range PCs, this modpack focuses on delivering smoother gameplay, faster load times, increased stability, and an optimized multiplayer experience.** 

_**Spanish**_

Este paquete de mods mejorará el rendimiento de tu dispositivo reduciendo el uso de RAM, aumentando los FPS y mucho más (ten en cuenta que incluye otros mods, no míos). ¡Descárgalo ahora y optimiza tu dispositivo!
